title: Demo: Acme Order Entry (GUI wizard)
summary: GUI-centric end-to-end demo. The agent drives a multi-step web form (input/app.html) in Chrome via screenshots/clicks/typing, entering data from input/order.json, to obtain a confirmation code computed in-browser, then writes it to output/result.txt. Exercises the full input/software/reference/output surface and the desktop GUI bridge.
